untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) prior upward gap on positive news event (broker upgrade) — requires fundamental data/news sentiment not in technical indicators; (2) exhaustion gap identification — requires multi-bar gap pattern matching across gap open/close vs prior close; (3) duration tracking (1-3 weeks of rise) — requires temporal state tracking not expressible in single-bar conditions; (4) price decline 'beginning' from gap highs — requires trend direction change detection. The doji pattern itself is translatable (small body_pct + balanced wicks), but the contextual prerequisites cannot be expressed with allowed indicators alone.
translation_notes: Entry conditions approximate doji formation using body_pct < 0.05 (small body on 0-1 scale) and balanced wicks. Exit targets return to 'launch price' which would require storing the gap reference price as a dynamic variable. The exhaustion gap context, upgrade catalyst, and multi-week duration requirement are fundamental/temporal factors outside the scope of price-action-only indicators.
